    89→def _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num_str, is_year=False):
    90→    """将阿拉伯数字字符串转换为中文读音形式

    92→    Args:

    95→
    96→    Returns:

    98→    """
    99→    if not num_str or not num_str.isdigit():
   100→        return num_str
   101→
   102→    # 年份：逐位读法
   103→    if is_year:
   104→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
   105→
   106→    # 普通数字：完整读法
   107→    try:
   108→        num = int(num_str)
   109→        if num < 10:
   110→            return CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str]
   111→        elif num < 20:
   112→            return '十' + (CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str[1]] if num_str[1] != '0' else '')
   113→        elif num < 100:
   114→            tens = num // 10
   115→            ones = num % 10
   116→            result = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(tens)] + '十' if tens != 1 else '十'
   117→            if ones > 0:
   118→                result += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(ones)]
   119→            return result
   120→        elif num < 1000:
   121→            hundreds = num // 100
   122→            remainder = num % 100
   123→            result = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(hundreds)] + '百'
   124→            if remainder > 0:
   125→                if remainder < 10:
   126→                    result += '零' + CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(remainder)]
   127→                elif remainder < 20:
   128→                    result += '一十'
   129→                    if remainder > 10:
   130→                        result += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(remainder % 10)]
   131→                else:
   132→                    result += _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))
   133→            return result
   134→        elif num < 10000:
   135→            thousands = num // 1000
   136→            remainder = num % 1000
   137→            result = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(thousands)] + '千'
   138→            if remainder > 0 and remainder < 100:
   139→                result += '零' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))
   140→            elif remainder >= 100:
   141→                result += _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))
   142→            return result
   143→        elif num < 100000000:
   144→            wan = num // 10000
   145→            remainder = num % 10000
   146→            result = _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(wan)) + '万'
   147→            if remainder > 0 and remainder < 1000:
   148→                result += '零' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))
   149→            elif remainder >= 1000:
   150→                result += _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))
   151→            return result
   152→        else:
   153→            yi = num // 100000000
   154→            remainder = num % 100000000
   155→            result = _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(yi)) + '亿'
   156→            if remainder > 0:
   157→                result += _arabic_to_chinese_simple(str(remainder))

   162→def _normalize_number_reading(text):
   163→    """规范化数字读音，将阿拉伯数字和中文数字转换为统一的拼音比较格式
   164→
   165→    处理规则：
   166→    1. 年份：2023年 → 二零二三年（逐位读）
   167→    2. 普通数字：15 → 十五（完整读）
   168→    3. 百分比：15% → 百分之十五
   169→    4. 范围：5-10 → 五到十，12%-20% → 百分之十二到百分之二十
   170→
   171→    例如：
   172→    - "2023年" → "二零二三年"
   173→    - "15亿至25亿美元" → "十五亿至二十五亿美元"
   174→    - "12%-20%" → "百分之十二到百分之二十"
   175→    - "5-10年" → "五到十年"
   176→    """
   177→    result = text
   178→
   179→    # 1. 先处理年份（必须先处理，因为年份是4位数字特殊读法）
   180→    # 例如：2023年 → 二零二三年
   181→    def convert_year(match):
   182→        year = match.group(1)
   183→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in year) + '年'
   184→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', convert_year, result)
   185→
   186→    # 2. 处理百分比范围：12%-20% → 百分之十二到百分之二十（必须在单独百分比之前处理）
   187→    def convert_percent_range(match):
   188→        num1 = match.group(1)
   189→        num2 = match.group(2)
   190→        return '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num1) + '到百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num2)
   191→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%-(\d+)%', convert_percent_range, result)
   192→
   193→    # 3. 处理范围表达式：5-10 → 五到十，5-10年 → 五到十年
   194→    def convert_range(match):
   195→        num1 = match.group(1)
   196→        num2 = match.group(2)
   197→        suffix = match.group(3) if match.group(3) else ''
   198→        return _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num1) + '到' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num2) + suffix
   199→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)-(\d+)(年|月|日|元|美元|亿|万|)?', convert_range, result)
   200→
   201→    # 4. 处理百分比：15% → 百分之十五
   202→    def convert_percent(match):
   203→        num = match.group(1)
   204→        return '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num)
   205→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', convert_percent, result)
   206→
   207→    # 5. 处理带单位的数字：15亿、25美元
   208→    def convert_with_unit(match):
   209→        num = match.group(1)
   210→        unit = match.group(2)
   211→        return _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num) + unit
   212→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)([亿万千百元块美])', convert_with_unit, result)
   213→
   214→    # 6. 处理剩余的纯阿拉伯数字：60 → 六十
   215→    def convert_number(match):
   216→        num = match.group(1)
   217→        return _arabic_to_chinese_simple(num)
   218→    result = re.sub(r'\b(\d+)\b', convert_number, result)
   219→
   220→    # 7. 清理多余的空格
   221→    result = re.sub(r'\s+', '', result)
   222→
   223→    return result
   224→
   225→def _same_pinyin(a: str, b: str) -> bool:
   226→    """Return True if two strings have identical pinyin with tones.
   227→
   228→    智能同音字识别：
   229→    - 长度相同时：逐字比较拼音（如 他/她）
   230→    - 长度不同时：检查是否都是同音词（如 的/地得/的）
   231→    - 先进行数字读音规范化，然后再比较拼音
   232→
   233→    性能优化：使用LRU缓存避免重复计算拼音
   234→    """
   235→    if not a or not b:
   236→        return False
   237→
   238→    # 先规范化数字读音
   239→    a_normalized = _normalize_number_reading(a)
   240→    b_normalized = _normalize_number_reading(b)
   241→
   242→    # Remove punctuation before comparing
   243→    a_clean = _normalize(a_normalized)
   244→    b_clean = _normalize(b_normalized)
   245→
   246→    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
   247→        return False
   248→
   249→    # 获取拼音列表
   250→    pa = [_get_char_pinyin(c) for c in a_clean]
   251→    pb = [_get_char_pinyin(c) for c in b_clean]
   252→
   253→    # 长度相同时：直接比较
   254→    if len(pa) == len(pb):
   255→        return pa == pb
   256→
   257→    # 长度不同时：检查是否是同音词
   258→    # 例如："的" vs "地得" 都是 "de"
   259→    # 如果A是B的子集且拼音相同，或者B是A的子集且拼音相同
   260→    if len(pa) < len(pb):
   261→        # 检查是否所有A的拼音都能在B中找到对应
   262→        return _is_subsequence_pinyin(pa, pb)
   263→    else:
   264→        # 检查是否所有B的拼音都能在A中找到对应
   265→        return _is_subsequence_pinyin(pb, pa)
   266→
   267→def _is_subsequence_pinyin(shorter, longer):
   268→    """检查较短的拼音序列是否是较长的拼音序列的同音子序列
   269→
   270→    例如：["de"] 是否是 ["de", "de"] 的子序列（的 vs 地得）
   271→
   272→    拼音格式：["声母", "韵母", "声调"] 如 ["d", "e", "5"]
   273→    需要转换为字符串比较
   274→    """
   275→    if not shorter:
   276→        return True
   277→    if not longer:
   278→        return False
   279→
   280→    # 将拼音列表转换为字符串（如 ['d', 'e', '5'] -> "de5"）
   281→    shorter_strs = [''.join(p) if isinstance(p, list) else str(p) for p in shorter]
   282→    longer_strs = [''.join(p) if isinstance(p, list) else str(p) for p in longer]
   283→
   284→    # 如果长短语的拼音集合相同（考虑重复），认为是同音
   285→    # 例如："的"(de) 和 "地得"(de, de) 都包含 "de"
   286→    from collections import Counter
   287→    shorter_counter = Counter(shorter_strs)
   288→    longer_counter = Counter(longer_strs)
   289→
   290→    # 检查较短序列的每个拼音是否都在较长序列中
   291→    for pinyin, count in shorter_counter.items():
   292→        if longer_counter.get(pinyin, 0) < count:
   293→            return False
   294→
   295→    return True
   296→
   297→def _is_punct(ch):
   298→    return bool(re.match(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', ch))
   299→
   300→def _normalize(text):
   301→    """Remove punctuation for comparison."""
   302→    return re.sub(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]', '', text)
   303→
   304→def _punct_only_diff(a, b):
   305→    """Return True if a and b differ only in punctuation (same chars after removing punct)."""
   306→    na, nb = _normalize(a), _normalize(b)
   307→    if na != nb:
   308→        return False
   309→    # Same content, check if sentence breaks match
   310→    return _sentence_breaks_match(a, b)
   311→
   312→def _get_sentence_breaks(text):
   313→    """Extract sentence break positions (char offsets after removing punct) from sentence-ending punctuation."""
   314→    breaks = []
   315→    char_idx = 0
   316→    for ch in text:
   317→        if _is_punct(ch):
   318→            if ch in '。！？.!?\n':
   319→                breaks.append(char_idx)
   320→        else:
   321→            char_idx += 1
   322→    return breaks
   323→
   324→def _sentence_breaks_match(doc_text, audio_text):
   325→    """Check if audio sentence breaks align with doc sentence breaks."""
   326→    doc_breaks = _get_sentence_breaks(doc_text)
   327→    audio_breaks = _get_sentence_breaks(audio_text)
   328→    if not doc_breaks and not audio_breaks:
   329→        return True
   330→    if not doc_breaks or not audio_breaks:
   331→        return len(doc_breaks) == len(audio_breaks)
   332→    return doc_breaks == audio_breaks
   333→
   334→def _segment(text: str) -> List[str]:
   335→    """Jieba word segmentation, filter empty tokens.
   336→
   337→    性能优化：确保jieba只初始化一次
   338→    """
   339→    _ensure_jieba_initialized()
   340→    return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
   341→
   342→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_text_norm, word_pos, doc_words):
   343→    """Map a word position in doc_words back to paragraph index."""
   344→    # Build char offset for each word
   345→    char_offset = 0
   346→    for i, w in enumerate(doc_words):
   347→        if i == word_pos:
   348→            break
   349→        char_offset += len(w)
   350→    # Find which paragraph this char offset falls in
   351→    running = 0
   352→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
   353→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
   354→        if running + plen > char_offset:
   355→            return idx
   356→        running += plen
   357→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
   358→
   359→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=None):
   360→    """Algorithm-based word-level diff using jieba + SequenceMatcher."""
   361→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   362→    confidence_threshold = config.get('confidence_threshold', 0.0)
   363→
   364→    # Normalize and segment
   365→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
   366→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
   367→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
   368→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
   369→
   370→    # Build char->timestamp mapping from word_timestamps
   371→    # 关键修复：需要将原始词语的时间戳映射到标准化文本的字符位置
   372→    ts_map = {}  # audio_norm char offset -> {start, end, confidence}
   373→    if word_timestamps:
   374→        offset = 0
   375→        for wt in word_timestamps:
   376→            # word_timestamps 中的词是从原始文本分词得到的
   377→            w_original = wt['word']
   378→            # 计算这个词在标准化后的形式和长度
   379→            w_normalized = _normalize(w_original)
   380→
   381→            # 只为标准化后保留的字符映射时间戳
   382→            for i in range(len(w_normalized)):
   383→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
   384→
   385→            # 偏移量按标准化后的长度递增
   386→            offset += len(w_normalized)
   387→
   388→    # Diff
   389→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   390→    raw_diffs = []
   391→
   392→    # Track audio char offset per audio_words position
   393→    audio_char_offsets = []
   394→    off = 0
   395→    for w in audio_words:
   396→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
   397→        off += len(w)
   398→
   399→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   400→        if tag == 'equal':
   401→            continue
   402→
   403→        doc_fragment = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   404→        audio_fragment = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   405→
   406→        # Skip filler words
   407→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
   408→            continue
   409→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
   410→            continue
   411→        if tag == 'replace':
   412→            if doc_fragment in FILLER_WORDS and audio_fragment in FILLER_WORDS:
   413→                continue
   414→            # Same pinyin+tone = same pronunciation, not a real diff
   415→            if _same_pinyin(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   416→                continue
   417→            # Punctuation-only difference: if sentence breaks match, not a diff
   418→            if _punct_only_diff(doc_fragment, audio_fragment):
   419→                continue
   420→
   421→        # Skip single punctuation or whitespace-only diffs
   422→        if not doc_fragment.strip() and not audio_fragment.strip():
   423→            continue
   424→        # Skip pure punctuation fragments
   425→        if all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in doc_fragment) and all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in audio_fragment):
   426→            continue
   427→
   428→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, doc_norm, i1, doc_words)
   429→
   430→        # Get timestamp and confidence for this diff
   431→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   432→        confidence = 1.0
   433→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   434→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   435→            if char_off in ts_map:
   436→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   437→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   438→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   439→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   440→                if end_off in ts_map:
   441→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   442→
   443→        diff_entry = {
   444→            'docText': doc_fragment,
   445→            'audioText': audio_fragment,
   446→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   447→            'position': pos,
   448→            'confidence': confidence,
   449→            'uncertain': confidence < confidence_threshold if confidence_threshold > 0 else False,
   450→        }
   451→        if ts_start is not None:
   452→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   453→        if ts_end is not None:
   454→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   455→
   456→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   457→
   458→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   459→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   460→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   461→
   462→    # Check sentence break alignment
   463→    break_ok = _sentence_breaks_match(doc_text, audio_text)
   464→    break_note = '' if break_ok else '\n⚠ 语音断句位置与原文不一致'
   465→
   466→    # WER/CER metrics
   467→    doc_str = ' '.join(doc_words)
   468→    audio_str = ' '.join(audio_words)
   469→    wer_val = wer(doc_str, audio_str) if doc_str else 0
   470→    cer_val = cer(doc_norm, audio_norm) if doc_norm else 0
   471→    accuracy_word = max(0, (1 - wer_val) * 100)
   472→    accuracy_char = max(0, (1 - cer_val) * 100)
   473→
   474→    summary = (f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读{break_note}\n'
   475→               f'词准确率 {accuracy_word:.1f}% | 字准确率 {accuracy_char:.1f}%')
   476→
   477→    return {
   478→        'diffs': raw_diffs, 'summary': summary,
   479→        'wer': wer_val, 'cer': cer_val,
   480→        'accuracy_word': accuracy_word, 'accuracy_char': accuracy_char,
   481→    }
   482→
   483→# --- LLM calls kept for test_llm ---
   484→def _call_claude(prompt, api_key, model):
   485→    r = requests.post('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', timeout=30,
   486→        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': api_key, 'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01'},
   487→        json={'model': model, 'max_tokens': 100, 'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': prompt}]})
   488→    if r.status_code == 401:
   489→        raise Exception('API Key 无效或已过期')
   490→    elif r.status_code == 429:
   491→        raise Exception('请求频率超限，请稍后再试')
   492→    elif r.status_code >= 500:
   493→        raise Exception(f'服务器错误 (HTTP {r.status_code})')
   494→    r.raise_for_status()
   495→    data = r.json()
   496→    return data.get('content', [{}])[0].get('text', '')
   497→
   498→def _call_openai_compat(prompt, api_key, endpoint, model):
   499→    r = requests.post(endpoint, timeout=30,
   500→        headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   501→        json={'model': model, 'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': prompt}], 'temperature': 0.1, 'max_tokens': 100})
   502→    if r.status_code == 401:
   503→        raise Exception('API Key 无效或已过期')
   504→    elif r.status_code == 429:
   505→        raise Exception('请求频率超限，请稍后再试')
   506→    elif r.status_code >= 500:
   507→        raise Exception(f'服务器错误 (HTTP {r.status_code})')
   508→    r.raise_for_status()
   509→    data = r.json()
   510→    return data.get('choices', [{}])[0].get('message', {}).get('content', '')
   511→
   512→def test_llm(provider_id, api_key, model=None):
   513→    from config import LLM_PROVIDERS
   514→    provider = LLM_PROVIDERS[provider_id]
   515→    m = model or provider['default_model']
   516→
   517→    # Basic validation
   518→    if not api_key or not api_key.strip():
   519→        return False, '请先输入 API Key'
   520→
   521→    # Provider-specific format validation
   522→    if provider_id == 'openai' and not api_key.startswith('sk-'):
   523→        return False, 'OpenAI API Key 格式错误（应以 sk- 开头）'
   524→    if provider_id == 'claude' and (len(api_key) < 20 or not api_key.startswith('sk-ant-')):
   525→        return False, 'Claude API Key 格式错误（应以 sk-ant- 开头）'
   526→
   527→    prompt = '请只回复"成功"两个字，不要添加其他内容。'
   528→    try:
   529→        content = ''
   530→        if provider_id == 'claude':
   531→            content = _call_claude(prompt, api_key, m)
   532→        else:
   533→            content = _call_openai_compat(prompt, api_key, provider['endpoint'], m)
   534→
   535→        if content and ('成功' in content or 'OK' in content.upper() or '连接成功' in content):
   536→            return True, '✓ 连接成功，API 可用'
   537→        elif content:
   538→            return True, f'✓ 连接成功（响应: {content[:30].strip()}）'
   539→        else:
   540→            return False, '连接成功但无响应内容'
   541→    except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
   542→        return False, '连接超时，请检查网络或稍后再试'
   543→    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
   544→        return False, '网络连接失败，请检查网络设置'
   545→    except Exception as e:
   546→        error_msg = str(e)
   547→        if 'API Key' in error_msg or '401' in error_msg:
   548→            return False, 'API Key 无效，请检查后重试'
   549→        elif '频率' in error_msg or '429' in error_msg:
   550→            return False, '请求过于频繁，请稍后再试'
   551→        else:
   552→            return False, f'连接失败: {error_msg[:80]}'
   553→

import os, time
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt
from docx.oxml.ns import qn

def _fmt_time(seconds):
    if seconds is None: return ''
    m, s = divmod(int(seconds), 60)
    ms = int((seconds - int(seconds)) * 100)
    return f'{m}:{s:02d}.{ms:02d}'

def parse_docx(filepath):
    doc = Document(filepath)
    return [p.text.strip() for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]

def generate_diff_docx(original_path, diffs, output_dir=None, summary=None):
    doc = Document(original_path)
    if output_dir is None:
        output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')

    # Insert summary at top if provided
    if summary:
        first = doc.paragraphs[0] if doc.paragraphs else None
        if first:
            p = first.insert_paragraph_before('')
        else:
            p = doc.add_paragraph('')
        r = p.add_run(summary)
        r.font.size = Pt(10)
        r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
        r.bold = True
        p.add_run('')  # spacer

    diff_by_pos = {}
    for d in diffs:
        diff_by_pos.setdefault(d.get('position', 0), []).append(d)

    para_map = [p for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]
    # Skip the summary paragraph we just inserted
    if summary and para_map and para_map[0].text.strip().startswith(summary[:10]):
        para_map = para_map[1:]

    for idx, para_diffs in diff_by_pos.items():
        if idx >= len(para_map):
            continue
        para = para_map[idx]
        text = para.text

        located = []
        used_positions = set()
        for d in para_diffs:
            doc_text = d.get('docText', '')
            dtype = d.get('type', 'mismatch')
            if dtype == 'extra_in_audio' or not doc_text:
                located.append((len(text), len(text), d))
                continue
            start = 0
            while True:
                pos = text.find(doc_text, start)
                if pos == -1:
                    located.append((len(text), len(text), d))
                    break
                if pos not in used_positions:
                    used_positions.add(pos)
                    located.append((pos, pos + len(doc_text), d))
                    break
                start = pos + 1

        located.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

        for r in para._element.findall(qn('w:r')):
            para._element.remove(r)

        cursor = 0
        for start, end, d in located:
            dtype = d.get('type', 'mismatch')
            audio_text = d.get('audioText', '')
            uncertain = d.get('uncertain', False)
            ts = _fmt_time(d.get('time_start'))
            # 如果有时间戳，显示时间戳；否则显示提示
            if ts:
                ts_label = f' 🕐 @{ts}'
            else:
                ts_label = f' (无时间戳)'
            uncertain_label = ' ?' if uncertain else ''

            if start > cursor:
                para.add_run(text[cursor:start])

            if dtype == 'mismatch':
                r = para.add_run(text[start:end])
                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                r.bold = True
                r.underline = True
                # 分段添加注释，时间戳用蓝色
                para.add_run('[误读为:"')
                note_text = para.add_run(audio_text)
                note_text.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                note_text.font.size = Pt(8)
                note_text.bold = True
                para.add_run('"')
                if ts_label:
                    ts_note = para.add_run(ts_label)
                    ts_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x00, 0x66, 0xCC)
                    ts_note.font.size = Pt(9)
                    ts_note.bold = True
                if uncertain_label:
                    uc_note = para.add_run(uncertain_label)
                    uc_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                    uc_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                    uc_note.bold = True
                end_note = para.add_run(']')
                end_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                end_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                end_note.bold = True
            elif dtype == 'missing_in_audio':
                r = para.add_run(text[start:end])
                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                r.bold = True
                r.underline = True
                para.add_run('[漏读')
                if ts_label:
                    ts_note = para.add_run(ts_label)
                    ts_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x00, 0x66, 0xCC)
                    ts_note.font.size = Pt(9)
                    ts_note.bold = True
                if uncertain_label:
                    uc_note = para.add_run(uncertain_label)
                    uc_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                    uc_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                    uc_note.bold = True
                end_note = para.add_run(']')
                end_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                end_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                end_note.bold = True
            elif dtype == 'extra_in_audio':
                para.add_run('[多读:"')
                note_text = para.add_run(audio_text)
                note_text.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                note_text.font.size = Pt(8)
                note_text.bold = True
                para.add_run('"')
                if ts_label:
                    ts_note = para.add_run(ts_label)
                    ts_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x00, 0x66, 0xCC)
                    ts_note.font.size = Pt(9)
                    ts_note.bold = True
                if uncertain_label:
                    uc_note = para.add_run(uncertain_label)
                    uc_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                    uc_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                    uc_note.bold = True
                end_note = para.add_run(']')
                end_note.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xFF, 0, 0)
                end_note.font.size = Pt(8)
                end_note.bold = True

            cursor = end

        if cursor < len(text):
            para.add_run(text[cursor:])

    ts = time.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    output_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'对比结果_{ts}.docx')
    doc.save(output_path)
    return output_path

   823→    def build(self):
   824→        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
   825→        self._load_config()
   826→        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
   827→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
   828→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
   829→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._load_diffs(), 1.5)
   830→        # 定时轮询新的 Share Intent（前台运行时接收微信分享）
   831→        Clock.schedule_interval(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 3)
   832→        return root

   834→    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================
   835→
   836→    def _config_path(self):
   837→        if platform == 'android':
   838→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   839→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
   840→        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')
   841→
   842→    def _load_config(self):
   843→        self._config = {
   844→            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
   845→            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
   846→            'asr_keys': {},
   847→            'llm_keys': {},
   848→        }
   849→        try:
   850→            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   851→                self._config.update(json.load(f))
   852→        except Exception:
   853→            pass
   854→
   855→        # 加载 ASR
   856→        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
   857→        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
   858→        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
   859→            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   860→
   861→        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
   862→        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
   863→        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
   864→            # 用户自定义了密钥
   865→            self.groq_key = groq_saved
   866→            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
   867→        else:
   868→            # 使用内置密钥
   869→            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
   870→            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
   871→            # 保存内置密钥到配置
   872→            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
   873→
   874→        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
   875→            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
   876→
   877→        # 加载 LLM
   878→        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
   879→        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
   880→        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
   881→        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
   882→        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
   883→            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')
   884→
   885→    def _save_config(self):
   886→        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
   887→        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
   888→        try:
   889→            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
   890→            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
   891→            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   892→                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   893→        except Exception:
   894→            pass
   895→
   896→    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================
   897→
   898→    def on_asr_change(self, text):
   899→        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
   900→        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
   901→            return
   902→        self.asr_provider = new_id
   903→        self.asr_display = text
   904→        self._save_config()
   905→
   906→    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
   907→        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
   908→        if not ip_text:
   909→            return
   910→        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
   911→            if ':' not in ip_text:
   912→                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
   913→            else:
   914→                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
   915→        self.funasr_server = ip_text
   916→        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
   917→        self._save_config()
   918→
   919→    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
   920→        key = key.strip()
   921→        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
   922→        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
   923→            self.groq_key = key
   924→        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
   925→            self.openai_key = key
   926→        self._save_config()
   927→
   928→    def test_funasr(self):
   929→        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
   930→        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()
   931→
   932→    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
   933→        import requests
   934→        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
   935→        try:
   936→            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
   937→            if r.status_code == 200:
   938→                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
   939→            else:
   940→                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
   941→        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
   942→            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
   943→        except Exception as e:
   944→            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')
   945→
   946→    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================
   947→
   948→    def _get_model_dir(self):
   949→        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
   950→        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
   951→            return builtin
   952→        if platform == 'android':
   953→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   954→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
   955→        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')
   956→
   957→    def _check_model_status(self):
   958→        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
   959→        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
   960→        if os.path.exists(model_file):
   961→            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
   962→            self.model_ready = True
   963→            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
   964→        else:
   965→            self.model_ready = False
   966→            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'
   967→
   968→    def download_model_async(self):
   969→        if self.model_downloading:
   970→            return
   971→        self.model_downloading = True
   972→        self.model_dl_progress = 0
   973→        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
   974→        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()
   975→
   976→    def _download_model_thread(self):
   977→        try:
   978→            from core.model_download import download_model
   979→            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
   980→
   981→            def progress_cb(msg):
   982→                # 解析百分比
   983→                import re
   984→                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
   985→                if m:
   986→                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
   987→                else:
   988→                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)
   989→
   990→            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
   991→            self._update_ui(
   992→                model_ready=True,
   993→                model_status='下载完成',
   994→                model_downloading=False,
   995→                model_dl_progress=100,
   996→            )
   997→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
   998→        except Exception as e:
   999→            self._update_ui(
  1000→                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
  1001→                model_downloading=False,
  1002→            )
  1003→
  1004→    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================
  1005→
  1006→    def on_llm_change(self, text):
  1007→        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
  1008→        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
  1009→            return
  1010→        # 保存旧的key
  1011→        if self.llm_key:
  1012→            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
  1013→                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key
  1014→
  1015→        self.llm_provider = new_id
  1016→        self.llm_display = text
  1017→        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
  1018→        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
  1019→        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
  1020→        self.llm_test_result = ''
  1021→        self._save_config()
  1022→
  1023→    def save_llm_key(self, key):
  1024→        key = key.strip()
  1025→        self.llm_key = key
  1026→        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
  1027→            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
  1028→        self._save_config()
  1029→
  1030→    def test_llm(self):
  1031→        if not self.llm_key:
  1032→            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
  1033→            return
  1034→        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
  1035→        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()
  1036→
  1037→    def _test_llm_thread(self):
  1038→        import requests
  1039→        pid = self.llm_provider
  1040→        key = self.llm_key
  1041→        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
  1042→        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
  1043→        model = info.get('default_model', '')
  1044→
  1045→        try:
  1046→            if pid == 'claude':
  1047→                headers = {
  1048→                    'x-api-key': key,
  1049→                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
  1050→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  1051→                }
  1052→                data = {
  1053→                    'model': model,
  1054→                    'max_tokens': 10,
  1055→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
  1056→                }
  1057→            elif pid == 'zhipu':
  1058→                # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token认证
  1059→                # 智谱API Key格式通常为 xxx.yyy 形式
  1060→                headers = {
  1061→                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
  1062→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  1063→                }
  1064→                data = {
  1065→                    'model': model,
  1066→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
  1067→                    'max_tokens': 10,
  1068→                    'stream': False,
  1069→                }
  1070→            else:
  1071→                headers = {
  1072→                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
  1073→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  1074→                }
  1075→                data = {
  1076→                    'model': model,
  1077→                    'max_tokens': 10,
  1078→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
  1079→                }
  1080→
  1081→            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
  1082→            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
  1083→                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
  1084→            else:
  1085→                # 解析错误信息
  1086→                try:
  1087→                    err_data = resp.json()
  1088→                    err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
  1089→                except:
  1090→                    err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
  1091→                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'HTTP {resp.status_code}: {err_msg}')
  1092→        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:

  1150→    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
  1151→        try:
  1152→            from jnius import autoclass
  1153→            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
  1154→            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
  1155→            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
  1156→            if file_type == 'audio':
  1157→                intent.setType('audio/*')
  1158→            else:
  1159→                intent.setType('application/*')
  1160→            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
  1161→            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
  1162→        except Exception as e:
  1163→            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

  1165→    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):

  1185→    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

  1187→    def _check_intent(self):
  1188→        if platform != 'android':
  1189→            return
  1190→        try:
  1191→            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
  1192→            files = get_android_shared_files()
  1193→            if not files:
  1194→                return
  1195→            # 去重：跳过已导入的文件
  1196→            new_files = [f for f in files if f not in self._imported_files]
  1197→            if not new_files:
  1198→                return
  1199→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
  1200→            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
  1201→            imported_any = False
  1202→            for f in new_files:
  1203→                self._imported_files.add(f)
  1204→                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
  1205→                ftype = classify_file(local)
  1206→                if ftype == 'audio':
  1207→                    self.audio_path = local
  1208→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
  1209→                    imported_any = True
  1210→                elif ftype == 'doc':
  1211→                    self.doc_path = local
  1212→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
  1213→                    imported_any = True
  1214→            if imported_any:
  1215→                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
  1216→        except Exception as e:
  1217→            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

  1219→    def scan_wechat_files(self):
  1220→        """扫描微信目录，弹出文件选择列表"""
  1221→        from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
  1222→        from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout as KBox
  1223→        from kivy.uix.button import Button as KButton
  1224→        from kivy.uix.label import Label as KLabel
  1225→        from kivy.uix.scrollview import ScrollView
  1226→        from kivy.metrics import dp
  1227→
  1228→        if platform == 'android':
  1229→            from core.wechat_import import scan_wechat_dirs, classify_file
  1230→            found = scan_wechat_dirs(max_files=15)
  1231→        else:
  1232→            # 桌面端：扫描用户下载目录作为演示
  1233→            from core.wechat_import import scan_wechat_dirs
  1234→            found = scan_wechat_dirs(max_files=15)
  1235→
  1236→        all_files = []
  1237→        for fpath, mtime in found.get('audio', []):
  1238→            all_files.append(('audio', fpath, mtime))
  1239→        for fpath, mtime in found.get('doc', []):
  1240→            all_files.append(('doc', fpath, mtime))
  1241→        all_files.sort(key=lambda x: x[2], reverse=True)
  1242→
  1243→        content = KBox(orientation='vertical', spacing=dp(4), padding=dp(8))
  1244→
  1245→        if not all_files:
  1246→            content.add_widget(KLabel(
  1247→                text='未在微信目录中找到音频或文档文件\n\n请先从微信保存文件到手机',
  1248→                font_size=dp(14), halign='center',
  1249→                text_size=(dp(280), None)))
  1250→        else:
  1251→            scroll = ScrollView()
  1252→            file_list = KBox(orientation='vertical', size_hint_y=None,
  1253→                             spacing=dp(3), padding=dp(2))
  1254→            file_list.bind(minimum_height=file_list.setter('height'))
  1255→
  1256→            popup_ref = [None]  # 用于在回调中关闭 popup
  1257→
  1258→            for ftype, fpath, mtime in all_files:
  1259→                fname = os.path.basename(fpath)
  1260→                tag = '🎵' if ftype == 'audio' else '📄'
  1261→                from datetime import datetime
  1262→                time_str = datetime.fromtimestamp(mtime).strftime('%m-%d %H:%M')
  1263→                btn = KButton(
  1264→                    text=f'{tag} {fname}  ({time_str})',
  1265→                    size_hint_y=None, height=dp(42),
  1266→                    font_size=dp(12), halign='left',
  1267→                    background_color=(0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1) if ftype == 'audio' else (0.2, 0.7, 0.4, 1),
  1268→                    background_normal='',
  1269→                )
  1270→                btn.text_size = (dp(300), None)
  1271→                # 绑定选择事件
  1272→                btn.bind(on_release=lambda inst, ft=ftype, fp=fpath: self._on_wechat_file_selected(ft, fp, popup_ref))
  1273→                file_list.add_widget(btn)
  1274→
  1275→            scroll.add_widget(file_list)
  1276→            content.add_widget(scroll)
  1277→
  1278→        popup = Popup(
  1279→            title='从微信目录选择文件',
  1280→            content=content,
  1281→            size_hint=(0.92, 0.7),
  1282→            auto_dismiss=True,
  1283→        )
  1284→        if all_files:
  1285→            popup_ref[0] = popup
  1286→        popup.open()

  1288→    def _on_wechat_file_selected(self, ftype, fpath, popup_ref):
  1289→        """用户从微信目录选择了文件"""

  1301→    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================
  1302→
  1303→    def start_compare(self):
  1304→        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
  1305→            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
  1306→            return
  1307→        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
  1308→        self.progress = 0
  1309→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()
  1310→
  1311→    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
  1312→        def _do(dt):
  1313→            for k, v in kwargs.items():
  1314→                setattr(self, k, v)
  1315→        Clock.schedule_once(_do)
  1316→
  1317→    def _do_compare(self):
  1318→        try:
  1319→            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
  1320→            from core.compare import compare_texts
  1321→            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt
  1322→
  1323→            # 步骤1: 转录
  1324→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
  1325→            keys = dict(self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {}))
  1326→            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
  1327→                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
  1328→            # Groq使用内置密钥
  1329→            if self.asr_provider == 'groq_whisper' and not keys.get('key'):
  1330→                keys['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
  1331→            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
  1332→                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
  1333→                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
  1334→            )
  1335→            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')
  1336→
  1337→            # 步骤2: 解析文档
  1338→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
  1339→            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
  1340→            if ext == '.txt':
  1341→                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
  1342→            else:
  1343→                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
  1344→            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
  1345→
  1346→            # 步骤3: 对比
  1347→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
  1348→            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
  1349→            self._update_ui(progress=95)
  1350→
  1351→            # 保存结果供报告生成使用
  1352→            self._last_audio_text = audio_text
  1353→            self._last_doc_text = doc_text
  1354→            self._last_result = result
  1355→            self._last_report_path = ''
  1356→
  1357→            # 保存原始差异数据（用于增删改搜）
  1358→            self._raw_diffs = [dict(d) for d in result['diffs']]
  1359→            self._save_diffs()
  1360→
  1361→            # 构建结果显示
  1362→            self._rebuild_diff_items()
  1363→
  1364→            self._update_ui(
  1365→                progress=100,
  1366→                status_text='对比完成',
  1367→                result_summary=result['summary'],
  1368→            )
  1369→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))
  1370→
  1371→        except Exception as e:
  1372→            import traceback
  1373→            traceback.print_exc()
  1374→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)
  1375→
  1376→    # ==================== 差异数据持久化 ====================
  1377→
  1378→    def _diffs_json_path(self):
  1379→        """获取差异数据JSON存储路径"""
  1380→        try:
  1381→            if platform == 'android':
  1382→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
  1383→                base = app_storage_path()
  1384→            else:
  1385→                base = os.path.expanduser('~')
  1386→        except Exception:
  1387→            base = os.path.expanduser('~')
  1388→        d = os.path.join(base, 'reports')
  1389→        os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
  1390→        return os.path.join(d, 'last_diffs.json')
  1391→
  1392→    def _save_diffs(self):
  1393→        """保存差异数据到JSON"""
  1394→        data = {
  1395→            'audio_path': self.audio_path,
  1396→            'doc_path': self.doc_path,
  1397→            'accuracy': self._last_result.get('accuracy', 0),
  1398→            'summary': self._last_result.get('summary', ''),
  1399→            'audio_text': self._last_audio_text,
  1400→            'doc_text': self._last_doc_text,
  1401→            'diffs': self._raw_diffs,
  1402→        }
  1403→        try:
  1404→            with open(self._diffs_json_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  1405→                json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
  1406→        except Exception:
  1407→            pass
  1408→
  1409→    def _load_diffs(self):
  1410→        """从JSON加载上次的差异数据"""
  1411→        try:
  1412→            with open(self._diffs_json_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  1413→                data = json.load(f)
  1414→            self._raw_diffs = data.get('diffs', [])
  1415→            self._last_audio_text = data.get('audio_text', '')
  1416→            self._last_doc_text = data.get('doc_text', '')
  1417→            self._last_result = {
  1418→                'diffs': self._raw_diffs,
  1419→                'accuracy': data.get('accuracy', 0),
  1420→                'summary': data.get('summary', ''),
  1421→                'n_mismatch': sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'mismatch'),
  1422→                'n_missing': sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'missing_in_audio'),
  1423→                'n_extra': sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'extra_in_audio'),
  1424→            }
  1425→            self.audio_path = data.get('audio_path', '')
  1426→            self.audio_name = os.path.basename(self.audio_path) if self.audio_path else ''
  1427→            self.doc_path = data.get('doc_path', '')
  1428→            self.doc_name = os.path.basename(self.doc_path) if self.doc_path else ''
  1429→            self.result_summary = data.get('summary', '')
  1430→            self._rebuild_diff_items()
  1431→            return True
  1432→        except Exception:
  1433→            return False
  1434→
  1435→    # ==================== 差异列表显示与搜索 ====================
  1436→
  1437→    def _rebuild_diff_items(self, keyword=''):
  1438→        """从原始差异数据重建UI显示列表，支持关键词过滤"""
  1439→        items = []
  1440→        type_labels = {
  1441→            'mismatch': '误读',
  1442→            'missing_in_audio': '漏读',
  1443→            'extra_in_audio': '多读',
  1444→        }
  1445→        for i, d in enumerate(self._raw_diffs):
  1446→            dtype = type_labels.get(d.get('type', ''), d.get('type', ''))
  1447→            ts_text = ''
  1448→            if 'time_start' in d and d['time_start'] is not None:
  1449→                try:
  1450→                    total_sec = int(float(d['time_start']))
  1451→                    m, s = divmod(total_sec, 60)
  1452→                    ts_text = f'第{m}分{s}秒'
  1453→                except (ValueError, TypeError):
  1454→                    pass
  1455→            if d.get('type') == 'mismatch':
  1456→                detail = f'原文: {d.get("docText", "")}  →  录音: {d.get("audioText", "")}'
  1457→            elif d.get('type') == 'missing_in_audio':
  1458→                detail = f'漏读: {d.get("docText", "")}'
  1459→            else:
  1460→                detail = f'多读: {d.get("audioText", "")}'
  1461→
  1462→            # 搜索过滤
  1463→            if keyword:
  1464→                kw = keyword.lower()
  1465→                if (kw not in detail.lower()
  1466→                        and kw not in dtype.lower()
  1467→                        and kw not in ts_text.lower()):
  1468→                    continue
  1469→
  1470→            items.append({
  1471→                'diff_type': f'【{dtype}】',
  1472→                'diff_detail': detail,
  1473→                'diff_timestamp': ts_text,
  1474→                'diff_index': i,
  1475→            })
  1476→
  1477→        def _do(dt):
  1478→            self.diff_items = items
  1479→        Clock.schedule_once(_do)
  1480→
  1481→    def filter_diffs(self, keyword):
  1482→        """搜索过滤差异列表"""
  1483→        self._search_keyword = keyword.strip()
  1484→        self._rebuild_diff_items(self._search_keyword)
  1485→
  1486→    # ==================== 差异点增删改 ====================
  1487→
  1488→    def edit_diff(self, index):
  1489→        """编辑指定索引的差异"""
  1490→        if index < 0 or index >= len(self._raw_diffs):
  1491→            return
  1492→        self._show_edit_popup(index)
  1493→
  1494→    def delete_diff(self, index):
  1495→        """删除指定索引的差异"""
  1496→        if index < 0 or index >= len(self._raw_diffs):
  1497→            return
  1498→        self._raw_diffs.pop(index)
  1499→        # 更新统计
  1500→        self._update_result_stats()
  1501→        self._save_diffs()
  1502→        self._rebuild_diff_items(self._search_keyword)
  1503→        self._last_report_path = ''  # 标记需要重新生成报告
  1504→
  1505→    def add_diff(self):
  1506→        """新增一个差异项"""
  1507→        self._show_edit_popup(-1)
  1508→
  1509→    def _update_result_stats(self):
  1510→        """更新差异统计信息"""
  1511→        n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'mismatch')
  1512→        n_missing = sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'missing_in_audio')
  1513→        n_extra = sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('type') == 'extra_in_audio')
  1514→        total = n_mismatch + n_missing + n_extra
  1515→        # 重新计算准确率
  1516→        doc_len = max(len(self._last_doc_text.replace(' ', '').replace('\n', '')), 1)
  1517→        diff_chars = sum(max(len(d.get('docText', '')), len(d.get('audioText', '')))
  1518→                         for d in self._raw_diffs)
  1519→        accuracy = max(0, (1 - diff_chars / doc_len) * 100)
  1520→        summary = f'共{total}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n字准确率 {accuracy:.1f}%'
  1521→        self._last_result.update({
  1522→            'diffs': self._raw_diffs,
  1523→            'accuracy': accuracy,
  1524→            'summary': summary,
  1525→            'n_mismatch': n_mismatch,
  1526→            'n_missing': n_missing,
  1527→            'n_extra': n_extra,
  1528→        })
  1529→        self._update_ui(result_summary=summary)
  1530→
  1531→    def _show_edit_popup(self, index):
  1532→        """显示编辑/新增差异的弹窗"""
  1533→        from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
  1534→        from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout as KBox
  1535→        from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput as KTextInput
  1536→        from kivy.uix.button import Button as KButton
  1537→        from kivy.uix.label import Label as KLabel
  1538→        from kivy.uix.spinner import Spinner as KSpinner
  1539→        from kivy.metrics import dp
  1540→
  1541→        is_new = (index == -1)
  1542→        if is_new:
  1543→            diff = {'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': '', 'audioText': '', 'time_start': 0}
  1544→        else:
  1545→            diff = dict(self._raw_diffs[index])
  1546→
  1547→        type_map = {'误读': 'mismatch', '漏读': 'missing_in_audio', '多读': 'extra_in_audio'}
  1548→        type_reverse = {v: k for k, v in type_map.items()}
  1549→        current_type_cn = type_reverse.get(diff.get('type', 'mismatch'), '误读')
  1550→
  1551→        content = KBox(orientation='vertical', spacing=dp(10), padding=dp(12))
  1552→
  1553→        # 类型选择
  1554→        row_type = KBox(size_hint_y=None, height=dp(38), spacing=dp(6))
  1555→        row_type.add_widget(KLabel(text='类型:', size_hint_x=0.25, font_size=dp(13)))
  1556→        type_spinner = KSpinner(
  1557→            text=current_type_cn,
  1558→            values=['误读', '漏读', '多读'],
  1559→            size_hint_x=0.75,
  1560→            font_size=dp(13),
  1561→        )
  1562→        row_type.add_widget(type_spinner)
  1563→        content.add_widget(row_type)
  1564→
  1565→        # 原文
  1566→        row_doc = KBox(orientation='vertical', size_hint_y=None, height=dp(70), spacing=dp(2))
  1567→        row_doc.add_widget(KLabel(text='原文内容:', size_hint_y=None, height=dp(20),
  1568→                                   font_size=dp(12), halign='left', text_size=(dp(300), None)))
  1569→        doc_input = KTextInput(text=diff.get('docText', ''), hint_text='输入原文',
  1570→                                font_size=dp(13), multiline=True)
  1571→        row_doc.add_widget(doc_input)
  1572→        content.add_widget(row_doc)
  1573→
  1574→        # 录音文本
  1575→        row_audio = KBox(orientation='vertical', size_hint_y=None, height=dp(70), spacing=dp(2))
  1576→        row_audio.add_widget(KLabel(text='录音文本:', size_hint_y=None, height=dp(20),
  1577→                                     font_size=dp(12), halign='left', text_size=(dp(300), None)))
  1578→        audio_input = KTextInput(text=diff.get('audioText', ''), hint_text='输入录音识别文本',
  1579→                                  font_size=dp(13), multiline=True)
  1580→        row_audio.add_widget(audio_input)
  1581→        content.add_widget(row_audio)
  1582→
  1583→        # 时间（秒）
  1584→        row_time = KBox(size_hint_y=None, height=dp(38), spacing=dp(6))
  1585→        row_time.add_widget(KLabel(text='时间(秒):', size_hint_x=0.3, font_size=dp(13)))
  1586→        time_val = ''
  1587→        if 'time_start' in diff and diff['time_start'] is not None:
  1588→            try:
  1589→                time_val = str(int(float(diff['time_start'])))
  1590→            except (ValueError, TypeError):
  1591→                time_val = ''
  1592→        time_input = KTextInput(text=time_val, hint_text='如: 65',
  1593→                                 font_size=dp(13), multiline=False,
  1594→                                 input_filter='int', size_hint_x=0.7)
  1595→        row_time.add_widget(time_input)
  1596→        content.add_widget(row_time)
  1597→
  1598→        # 按钮栏
  1599→        btn_row = KBox(size_hint_y=None, height=dp(44), spacing=dp(8))
  1600→
  1601→        popup = Popup(
  1602→            title='新增差异' if is_new else '编辑差异',
  1603→            content=content,
  1604→            size_hint=(0.92, 0.72),
  1605→            auto_dismiss=True,
  1606→        )
  1607→
  1608→        def on_save(instance):
  1609→            new_type = type_map.get(type_spinner.text, 'mismatch')
  1610→            new_diff = {
  1611→                'type': new_type,
  1612→                'docText': doc_input.text.strip(),
  1613→                'audioText': audio_input.text.strip(),
  1614→                'confidence': diff.get('confidence', 1.0),
  1615→                'position': diff.get('position', 0),
  1616→            }
  1617→            # 时间戳：用户输入的是秒数
  1618→            try:
  1619→                seconds = int(time_input.text.strip())
  1620→                new_diff['time_start'] = seconds
  1621→            except (ValueError, TypeError):
  1622→                pass  # 不设置时间戳
  1623→
  1624→            if is_new:
  1625→                self._raw_diffs.append(new_diff)
  1626→            else:
  1627→                self._raw_diffs[index] = new_diff
  1628→
  1629→            self._update_result_stats()
  1630→            self._save_diffs()
  1631→            self._rebuild_diff_items(self._search_keyword)
  1632→            self._last_report_path = ''
  1633→            popup.dismiss()
  1634→
  1635→        def on_cancel(instance):
  1636→            popup.dismiss()
  1637→
  1638→        save_btn = KButton(text='保存', font_size=dp(14),
  1639→                           background_color=(0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1),
  1640→                           background_normal='')
  1641→        save_btn.bind(on_release=on_save)
  1642→        btn_row.add_widget(save_btn)
  1643→
  1644→        cancel_btn = KButton(text='取消', font_size=dp(14),
  1645→                             background_color=(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1),
  1646→                             background_normal='')
  1647→        cancel_btn.bind(on_release=on_cancel)
  1648→        btn_row.add_widget(cancel_btn)
  1649→
  1650→        content.add_widget(btn_row)
  1651→        popup.open()
  1652→
  1653→    # ==================== Word报告生成 ====================
  1654→
  1655→    def generate_word_report(self):
  1656→        """生成Word对比报告"""
  1657→        if not self._last_result:
  1658→            self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
  1659→            return
  1660→        self.status_text = '正在生成报告...'
  1661→        threading.Thread(target=self._gen_report_thread, daemon=True).start()
  1662→
  1663→    def _gen_report_thread(self):
  1664→        try:
  1665→            from core.report_gen import generate_report
  1666→            # 使用 _raw_diffs 作为数据源（支持用户编辑后重新生成）
  1667→            result_for_report = dict(self._last_result)
  1668→            result_for_report['diffs'] = self._raw_diffs
  1669→            path = generate_report(
  1670→                audio_path=self.audio_path,
  1671→                doc_path=self.doc_path,
  1672→                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
  1673→                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
  1674→                result=result_for_report,
  1675→            )
  1676→            self._last_report_path = path
  1677→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告已保存: {os.path.basename(path)}')
  1678→            # 弹出预览/打开选项
  1679→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._show_report_preview(path))
  1680→        except Exception as e:
  1681→            import traceback
  1682→            traceback.print_exc()
  1683→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告生成失败: {str(e)[:50]}')
  1684→
  1685→    def _show_report_preview(self, file_path):
  1686→        """显示报告预览弹窗，提供打开/分享选项"""
  1687→        from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
  1688→        from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout as KBox
  1689→        from kivy.uix.button import Button as KButton
  1690→        from kivy.uix.label import Label as KLabel
  1691→        from kivy.metrics import dp
  1692→
  1693→        content = KBox(orientation='vertical', spacing=dp(12), padding=dp(16))
  1694→
  1695→        # 报告信息
  1696→        fname = os.path.basename(file_path)
  1697→        try:
  1698→            size_kb = os.path.getsize(file_path) // 1024
  1699→            size_text = f'{size_kb}KB'
  1700→        except:
  1701→            size_text = ''
  1702→
  1703→        info_label = KLabel(
  1704→            text=f'报告已生成\n\n{fname}\n大小: {size_text}',
  1705→            font_size=dp(14),
  1706→            halign='center',
  1707→            text_size=(dp(280), None),
  1708→            size_hint_y=None,
  1709→            height=dp(90),
  1710→            color=(0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1),
  1711→        )
  1712→        content.add_widget(info_label)
  1713→
  1714→        # 差异摘要
  1715→        n_diffs = len(self._raw_diffs)
  1716→        has_ts = sum(1 for d in self._raw_diffs if d.get('time_start') is not None)
  1717→        summary_label = KLabel(
  1718→            text=f'包含 {n_diffs} 处差异标注，{has_ts} 处带时间戳',
  1719→            font_size=dp(12),
  1720→            halign='center',
  1721→            text_size=(dp(280), None),
  1722→            size_hint_y=None,
  1723→            height=dp(30),
  1724→            color=(0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1),
  1725→        )
  1726→        content.add_widget(summary_label)
  1727→
  1728→        popup = Popup(
  1729→            title='报告生成完成',
  1730→            content=content,
  1731→            size_hint=(0.88, 0.55),
  1732→            auto_dismiss=True,
  1733→        )
  1734→
  1735→        # 按钮区
  1736→        btn_row = KBox(size_hint_y=None, height=dp(46), spacing=dp(8))
  1737→
  1738→        open_btn = KButton(
  1739→            text='打开预览',
  1740→            font_size=dp(14),
  1741→            background_color=(0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1),
  1742→            background_normal='',
  1743→        )
  1744→        open_btn.bind(on_release=lambda inst: self._open_file(file_path, popup))
  1745→        btn_row.add_widget(open_btn)
  1746→
  1747→        share_btn = KButton(
  1748→            text='分享',
  1749→            font_size=dp(14),
  1750→            background_color=(0.2, 0.7, 0.4, 1),
  1751→            background_normal='',
  1752→        )
  1753→        share_btn.bind(on_release=lambda inst: (popup.dismiss(), self._do_share(file_path)))
  1754→        btn_row.add_widget(share_btn)
  1755→
  1756→        close_btn = KButton(
  1757→            text='关闭',
  1758→            font_size=dp(14),
  1759→            background_color=(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1),
  1760→            background_normal='',
  1761→        )
  1762→        close_btn.bind(on_release=lambda inst: popup.dismiss())
  1763→        btn_row.add_widget(close_btn)
  1764→
  1765→        content.add_widget(btn_row)
  1766→        popup.open()
  1767→
  1768→    def _open_file(self, file_path, popup=None):
  1769→        """用系统应用打开文件（预览Word文档）"""
  1770→        if popup:
  1771→            popup.dismiss()
  1772→        if platform == 'android':
  1773→            try:
  1774→                from jnius import autoclass
  1775→                Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
  1776→                PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
  1777→                Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
  1778→                File = autoclass('java.io.File')
  1779→                FileProvider = autoclass('androidx.core.content.FileProvider')
  1780→
  1781→                activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
  1782→                file_obj = File(file_path)
  1783→
  1784→                try:
  1785→                    uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
  1786→                        activity,
  1787→                        activity.getPackageName() + '.fileprovider',
  1788→                        file_obj
  1789→                    )
  1790→                except Exception:
  1791→                    uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)
  1792→
  1793→                intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW)
  1794→                intent.setDataAndType(
  1795→                    uri,
  1796→                    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'
  1797→                )
  1798→                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
  1799→                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
  1800→
  1801→                activity.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, '预览报告'))
  1802→                self.status_text = '已打开预览'
  1803→            except Exception as e:
  1804→                self.status_text = f'打开失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1805→        else:
  1806→            # 桌面端：用默认程序打开
  1807→            try:
  1808→                import subprocess
  1809→                import sys
  1810→                if sys.platform == 'win32':
  1811→                    os.startfile(file_path)
  1812→                elif sys.platform == 'darwin':
  1813→                    subprocess.Popen(['open', file_path])
  1814→                else:
  1815→                    subprocess.Popen(['xdg-open', file_path])
  1816→                self.status_text = f'已打开: {os.path.basename(file_path)}'
  1817→            except Exception as e:
  1818→                self.status_text = f'打开失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1819→
  1820→    # ==================== 微信分享 ====================
  1821→
  1822→    def share_to_wechat(self):
  1823→        """分享报告到微信"""
  1824→        if not self._last_report_path:
  1825→            # 先生成报告再分享
  1826→            if not self._last_result:
  1827→                self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
  1828→                return
  1829→            self.status_text = '正在生成并分享...'
  1830→            threading.Thread(target=self._gen_and_share_thread, daemon=True).start()
  1831→        else:
  1832→            self._do_share(self._last_report_path)
  1833→
  1834→    def _gen_and_share_thread(self):
  1835→        try:
  1836→            from core.report_gen import generate_report
  1837→            result_for_report = dict(self._last_result)
  1838→            result_for_report['diffs'] = self._raw_diffs
  1839→            path = generate_report(
  1840→                audio_path=self.audio_path,
  1841→                doc_path=self.doc_path,
  1842→                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
  1843→                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
  1844→                result=result_for_report,
  1845→            )
  1846→            self._last_report_path = path
  1847→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._do_share(path))
  1848→        except Exception as e:
  1849→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'生成报告失败: {str(e)[:50]}')
  1850→
  1851→    def _do_share(self, file_path):
  1852→        """执行分享操作"""
  1853→        if platform == 'android':
  1854→            try:
  1855→                from jnius import autoclass
  1856→                Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
  1857→                PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
  1858→                Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
  1859→                File = autoclass('java.io.File')
  1860→                FileProvider = autoclass('androidx.core.content.FileProvider')
  1861→
  1862→                activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
  1863→                file_obj = File(file_path)
  1864→
  1865→                # 使用FileProvider获取content URI（Android 7.0+）
  1866→                try:
  1867→                    uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
  1868→                        activity,
  1869→                        activity.getPackageName() + '.fileprovider',
  1870→                        file_obj
  1871→                    )
  1872→                except Exception:
  1873→                    uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)
  1874→
  1875→                intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
  1876→                intent.setType('application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document')
  1877→                intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
  1878→                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
  1879→
  1880→                chooser = Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享核对报告')
  1881→                activity.startActivity(chooser)
  1882→                self.status_text = '已打开分享面板'
  1883→            except Exception as e:
  1884→                self.status_text = f'分享失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1885→        else:
  1886→            self.status_text = f'报告已保存: {file_path}'
  1887→
  1888→
  1889→if __name__ == '__main__':
  1890→    VoiceDocApp().run()
  1891→

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty, BooleanProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

from core.config import (
    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.96, 0.96, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(52)
        padding: dp(12), 0
        spacing: dp(8)
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size

        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(19)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

        Button:
            text: '返回' if sm.current != 'home' else '配置'
            size_hint_x: None
            width: dp(60)
            font_size: dp(14)
            background_color: 0.15, 0.5, 0.75, 1
            background_normal: ''
            on_release: sm.current = 'home' if sm.current != 'home' else 'settings'

    # ScreenManager
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        # ==================== 首页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                do_scroll_x: False
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(14)
                    spacing: dp(10)

                    # 微信导入区
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        orientation: 'vertical'
                        spacing: dp(4)
                        padding: dp(10)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.88, 0.95, 0.88, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '微信长按文件 → 分享 → 选择本应用 即可导入'
                            font_size: dp(12)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'
                            size_hint_y: 0.4
                        Button:
                            text: '从微信目录导入'
                            size_hint_y: 0.6
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.7, 0.35, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.scan_wechat_files()

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # ASR引擎快捷选择
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(44)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: '识别引擎:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.22
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: home_asr_spinner
                            text: app.asr_display
                            values: app.asr_names
                            size_hint_x: 0.78
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # 开始对比
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(54)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.93, 0.26, 0.26, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 状态
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(34)
                        font_size: dp(13)
                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
                        text_size: self.size
                        halign: 'center'
                        valign: 'center'

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(6)

        # ==================== 设置页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'settings'
            ScrollView:
                do_scroll_x: False
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(14)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # ---- 语音转写配置标题 ----
                    Label:
                        text: '语音转写引擎'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(32)
                        font_size: dp(17)
                        bold: True
                        color: 0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 1
                        halign: 'left'
                        text_size: self.size
                        valign: 'center'
